changelogNotification: Task Note Management Plugin: Update Notification
moreChangelog: For more update logs, please visit:
name: Task Note Management
pleaseSelectSortCriteria: Please select at least one sort criterion
spanningEventDesc: Set end date for multi-day events, leave empty for single-day events
noTimeDesc: All day reminder if no time is set
noTimeDescLeaveEmpty: Leave empty for all day reminder
confirmDeleteSession: Are you sure you want to delete this Pomodoro record?
confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete task "${title}"? This action cannot be undone.
confirmDeleteReminder: Are you sure you want to delete reminder "${title}"? This action cannot be undone.
confirmDeleteNormal: Are you sure you want to delete this item?
hierarchicalBatchCompleted: Hierarchical tasks created: ${parentCount} parent tasks, ${childCount} subtasks
taskListStatusTargetNotFound: No task list items found to update
enableTaskListStatusSyncDesc: When enabled, setting a task to in-progress or abandoned automatically updates the task list marker (/-); when disabled, only completed (x) status is synced
taskListStatusResetDone: Task list in-progress/abandoned status has been reset
taskListStatusRestoreDone: Task list in-progress/abandoned status has been restored
batchSetReminderDesc: Will set the same reminder time for the following ${count} blocks
pleaseSetStartDateForRepeat: Please set a start date to create a repeating reminder
endDateCannotBeEarlier: End date cannot be earlier than start date
endTimeCannotBeEarlier: End time cannot be earlier than start time
timeRequiresDate: Please select a date before setting a time
endDateAdjusted: End date has been automatically adjusted to start date
saveReminderFailed: Failed to save reminder, please try again
multilineTitleChoice: Task titles are usually a single line. Please choose how to handle the extra lines:
moveOthersToNote: Save first line as title and others as note
deleteReminderFailed: Failed to delete reminder, please try again
setPriorityFailed: Failed to set priority, please try again
openNoteFailed: Failed to open note, the block may have been deleted
blockNotExist: Selected note block does not exist, cannot create reminder
cannotGetNoteContent: Cannot get note content, the block may have been deleted
batchSetFailed: Batch set reminders failed, please try again
batchSaveFailed: Batch save reminders failed, please try again
noteBlockDeleted: The note block may have been deleted. Do you want to delete related reminders?
openModifyDialogFailed: Failed to open modify dialog, please try again
selectBlockFirst: Please select a block in the document first, then create a reminder for it
syncBlockTitle: Update title to bound block content
syncTitleToBlock: Update bound block content to current title
confirmSyncTitleToBlockMessage: Are you sure you want to update the bound block content to the current title?
ebbinghausDesc: Memory review pattern based on Ebbinghaus forgetting curve
icsDailySyncTimeDesc: Set the time to sync daily, format HH:MM (e.g., 08:00)
confirmDeleteInstance: Are you sure to delete this instance of the recurring event?
deleteInstanceNotImplemented: Delete single repeat instance feature not yet implemented
cannotMoveRepeatInstance: Cannot move repeat event instance, please edit the original event
cannotResizeRepeatInstance: Cannot resize repeat event instance, please edit the original event
editingInstanceDesc: Editing a single instance of recurring event. Changes will only affect this occurrence.
howToApplyEveryDayChanges: How would you like to apply the changes to this reminder time?
howToApplyEveryDayDelete: How would you like to delete this reminder time?
toggleAllDayFailed: Failed to toggle all day event
confirmSkipFirstOccurrence: Are you sure to skip the first occurrence? The recurring event will start from the next cycle.
firstOccurrenceSkipped: First occurrence skipped, recurring event will start from the next cycle
confirmResetCategories: Are you sure to reset categories to default? This will delete all custom categories.
confirmDeleteCategory: Are you sure to delete the category "${name}"? This action cannot be undone.
loadCategoriesFailed: Failed to load categories. Please try again.
saveCategoriesFailed: Failed to save categories. Please try again.
deleteCategoryFailed: Failed to delete category. Please try again.
resetCategoriesFailed: Failed to reset categories. Please try again.
notificationSoundDesc: Set the sound file path for reminders, leave empty for silent mode
pomodoroWorkDurationDesc: Set the duration of pomodoro work phase, default 25 minutes
pomodoroBreakDurationDesc: Set the duration of pomodoro short break phase, default 5 minutes
pomodoroLongBreakDurationDesc: Set the duration of pomodoro long break phase, default 30 minutes
pomodoroPresetDialogHint: Add, edit, or remove the pomodoro minute presets shown in the task context menu.
pomodoroPresetEmpty: No presets yet. Use the button below to add one.
pomodoroPresetInvalid: Please enter an integer greater than 0
showPomodoroBreakTimeDesc: Display remaining break time in pomodoro interface
pomodoroLongBreakIntervalDesc: Set how many pomodoros before automatically entering long break mode, default 4 pomodoros
pomodoroAutoModeDesc: (For countdown pomodoro only) When enabled, work timer automatically enters break timer after completion, break automatically starts work timer, and automatically enters long break mode based on set interval
pomodoroMiniWindowStyleDesc: Choose the display style for the pomodoro mini window: ring, horizontal progress bar, or minimal progress bar
dailyFocusGoalDesc: Set daily focus goal duration (hours), 0 means no progress display
workVolumeDesc: Set the volume of background music during work phase independently, range 0-1
breakVolumeDesc: Set the volume of background music during short break phase independently, range 0-1
longBreakVolumeDesc: Set the volume of background music during long break phase independently, range 0-1
workEndVolumeDesc: Set the volume of work end alert sound independently, range 0-1
breakEndVolumeDesc: Set the volume of break end alert sound independently, range 0-1
randomRestVolumeDesc: Set the volume of random micro-break start alert sound independently, range 0-1
randomRestEndVolumeDesc: Set the volume of random micro-break end alert sound independently, range 0-1
pomodoroWorkSoundDesc: Set the background sound file path during work, leave empty for silent
pomodoroBreakSoundDesc: Set the background sound file path during break, leave empty for silent
pomodoroLongBreakSoundDesc: Set the background sound file path during long break, leave empty for silent
pomodoroWorkEndSoundDesc: Set the notification sound file path when pomodoro work phase ends, leave empty for silent
pomodoroBreakEndSoundDesc: Set the notification sound file path when pomodoro break phase ends, leave empty for silent
randomRestEnabledDesc: Play random rest sounds at intervals during pomodoro, followed by micro-breaks. Uses interval effect and random rewards to improve focus and work efficiency.
randomRestMinIntervalDesc: Set the minimum interval for random rest sounds, default 3 minutes
randomRestMaxIntervalDesc: Set the maximum interval for random rest sounds, default 5 minutes
randomRestSoundsDesc: Set the random rest sound file path during pomodoro, leave empty to disable
randomRestEndSoundDesc: Set the notification sound file path after random rest ends, leave empty for no sound
randomRestSystemNotificationDesc: Show system notification when random rest plays, reminding to start break and end break
confirmDeleteFolder: Are you sure you want to delete folder "${name}"? Note: Projects in this folder will not be deleted, they will just be removed from this folder.
unassignedTasksProjectId: Default project for tasks without a project
unassignedTasksProjectIdDesc: Newly created tasks without a specified project will automatically belong to this project
deleteReminderConfirm:
Are you sure to delete this reminder?
Title: ${title}
Date: ${date}
deleteRepeatInstanceConfirm:
Are you sure to delete this repeat reminder instance?
Title: ${title}
Date: ${date}
editingInstanceDescription: Editing first occurrence will split the recurring series. A new series will start from the next cycle.
exampleInputs: e.g.: tomorrow 3pm, next Friday, in 3 days, etc.
applyToSelected: Will apply to all selected blocks
cannotRecognize: ❌ Cannot recognize date time, please try other expressions
pomodoroSystemNotificationDesc: Show system notification popup when pomodoro session ends
pomodoroGlobalWindowDesc: Desktop app only. When enabled, the pomodoro timer is shown in a standalone window that can stay visible over other applications
reminderSystemNotificationDesc: Show system notification popup when events are due, supports clicking to jump to related blocks
reminderSkipWeekendsDesc: Choose whether to skip Saturday and Sunday, Saturday only, Sunday only, or no weekend days. Only applies to repeating tasks and multi-day tasks that include both skipped and unskipped dates.
reminderSkipHolidaysDesc: Only applies to repeating tasks and multi-day tasks that span both holidays and non-holidays. Repeating tasks can override this in repeat settings; multi-day tasks can override it in the task edit dialog.
checkboxActionForSpanningAndDessertDesc: When clicking the checkbox for multi-day spanning tasks and daily available tasks, choose whether to mark as today completed or globally completed. Default is global completion.
reminderSkipRepeatDesc: When enabled, repeating task instances that fall on weekends or holidays are not generated.
showInternalNotificationDesc: Show internal notification dialog when task/habit reminder triggers
dailyNotificationTimeDesc: Set the time of day (HH:MM) to show daily reminders (e.g., '09:00'); default is 08:00
dailyNotificationEnabledDesc: Show a unified daily summary notification of all-day items at the specified time. When disabled, daily reminder notifications will not be displayed
dailyRemindersMessage: You have ${overdue} overdue items and ${today} today's items
randomRest: Please take a ${duration}s break and then continue working.
pomodoroHintDesc: See my article "In-depth Guide to Pomodoro Technique"
pomodoroStopConfirmContent: Detected you've focused for ${minutes} minutes. Save this session as a Pomodoro?
pomodoroWindowUpdated: Pomodoro timer updated in standalone window
pomodoroSettingsApplied: Pomodoro settings applied to open timers
pomodoroDockPositionDesc: Set the position of the docked Pomodoro timer window
autoDetectDateTimeDesc: Automatically detect date and time information in block content when creating reminders, supports natural language expressions like 'tomorrow 3pm', 'next Friday', etc.
removeDateAfterDetection: Remove date from title after detection
removeDateAfterDetectionDesc: Automatically remove recognized date and time description text from the task title
singleDateDefaultRoleDesc: When a title has one date and no start/deadline keyword, choose whether it fills the start date or deadline.
quickReminderTitlePasteAutoDetectDesc: When enabled, pasted text in the task edit dialog title auto-detects date and time. You can still turn it off in the dialog temporarily.
defaultHeadingLevelDesc: Set the default heading level (1-6) for new headings, default is 3
defaultHeadingPositionDesc: Set the default position for new headings, prepend means at the top of the document, append means at the bottom
taskStatsDeleteUnsupported: Task stats does not support deleting records yet
addedToProjectSuccess: Successfully added ${count} blocks to the project
saveStatusFailed: Failed to save status, please try again
confirmDeleteStatus: Are you sure to delete the status "${name}"?
confirmResetStatuses: Are you sure to reset the status list to default? This action cannot be undone.
confirmDeleteMilestone: Are you sure you want to delete milestone "${name}"?
startDateAfterEndDate: Start date cannot be later than end date
dataStorageLocationDesc:
All plugin data (task reminders, project management, pomodoro records, etc.) is stored in:
data/storage/petal/siyuan-plugin-task-note-management
openDataFolderDesc: Click the button to open the data storage folder in file manager
restoreDefaultSettingsDesc: Restore plugin settings to defaults. Task, project, habit, and other data will not be deleted.
confirmRestoreDefaultSettings: Restore plugin settings to defaults? Task, project, habit, and other data will not be deleted.
lunarDateDesc: The corresponding Gregorian date will be automatically calculated based on the lunar date
invalidLunarDay: Invalid lunar day, please enter a value between 1-30
clickToJumpToNote: Click to jump to project note
listCreationPlaceholder:
Example:
- Complete project documentation @priority=high&startDate=2025-08-12&endDate=2025-08-15
  - Requirements document
  - Technical design
    - Architecture design
    - Interface design
- Prepare meeting materials @priority=medium&startDate=2025-08-13
  - PPT creation
  - Data organization
- [SiYuan Note Plugin Development丨Task Note Management Plugin](siyuan://blocks/20250610000808-3vqwuh3)
- Learn new technology @priority=low
confirmDeleteRepeat: Are you sure you want to delete all instances of the recurring task "${title}"? This action cannot be undone.
confirmDeleteTask: Are you sure you want to delete task "${title}"? This action cannot be undone.
includesNSubtasks: This task includes ${count} subtasks (including multi-level subtasks), which will also be deleted.
switchAndInherit: Switch task and inherit current progress
stopwatchPomodoroInherit: Switched to stopwatch mode and inherited ${phase} progress
confirmDeleteTaskWithSubtasks:
Are you sure you want to delete task "${title}" and its ${count} subtasks?

This action cannot be undone.
taskNotExistOrDeleted: Task does not exist or has been deleted
urgencyThresholdDesc: Count tasks ending within these days as urgent
pomodoroAlreadyRunningConfirm: Another Pomodoro is running. Stop it and start a new one?
standaloneWindowDetected: Standalone window detected, updating Pomodoro in it
stopwatchSwitchedInherit: Switched to stopwatch mode and inherited ${phase} progress
switchToStopwatchWithInherit: Switched to stopwatch mode and inherited ${phase} progress
pomodoroUnavailable: Unable to start Pomodoro: plugin instance unavailable
blockIdFormat: Supports block ID or block reference format, e.g.: ((blockId 'title'))
enterBlockIdOrPasteRef: Enter block ID or paste block reference
invalidBlockId: Please enter a valid block ID or block reference
originalRecurringEvent: Original recurring event does not exist
confirmDeleteInstanceOf: Are you sure you want to delete the instance of recurring task "${title}" on ${date}?
taskSetAsSubtask: "{childTitle}" has been set as a subtask of "{parentTitle}"
clickToJumpToProjectNote: Click to jump to project note
clickToJumpToBoundBlock: Click to jump to bound block: ${title}
todayStartDesc: Set the start of a day, e.g. 03:00. Records before this time count for the previous day
createDocumentAndBindNote: Create Document and Bind as Project Note
createFromListDesc: Paste Markdown list or multi-line text, each line will create a task. Supports multi-level lists to automatically create parent-child tasks.
multiLevelSupport: Multi-level support: Use indentation or multiple - symbols to create parent-child task relationships
bindBlockIdHint: After binding a block, click the group title to jump to the corresponding block, and support hover preview
clickToJumpToBlock: Click to jump to the bound block
confirmDeleteGroup: Are you sure to delete group "${name}"?
groupHasTasks: This group has ${count} tasks, please choose how to handle:
groupDeletedTasksUngrouped: Group deleted, ${count} tasks set as ungrouped
groupDeletedTasksMoved: Group deleted, ${count} tasks moved to new group
convertGroupToProjectConfirm: Convert group "${name}" to a standalone project
convertGroupToProjectSuccess: Group "${name}" converted to project, ${count} tasks migrated
convertGroupToProjectFailed: Failed to convert group to project
pasteBlockRefSuccess: Successfully pasted and parsed block information
pasteBlockRefFailed: Failed to parse block information from clipboard content
enableReminderDockDesc: Show or hide the Task (Reminder) panel in the sidebar
enableProjectDockDesc: Show or hide the Project panel (Kanban) in the sidebar
enableHabitDockDesc: Show or hide the Habit tracking panel in the sidebar
enableCalendarDockDesc: Show or hide the Calendar View panel in the sidebar
enableCalendarTopBarDesc: Show a button in the top toolbar to open the calendar view
enableMobileTaskShortcutDesc: Show a task shortcut button on phones after startup (not on tablets); tapping it opens the task sidebar in a dialog
enableDockBadgeDesc: Show or hide numeric badge counters on sidebar icons (reminder/project/habit)
enableReminderDockBadgeDesc: Show or hide the numeric badge counter on the Reminder/Task sidebar icon
enableProjectDockBadgeDesc: Show or hide the numeric badge counter on the Project sidebar icon
enableHabitDockBadgeDesc: Show or hide the numeric badge counter on the Habit sidebar icon
showTaskCardDocumentTitle: Show Document Title on Task Cards
showTaskCardDocumentTitleDesc: When enabled, task cards bound to non-document blocks show the title of the containing document
treatStartDateOnlyAsOverdue: Treat start-date-only tasks as overdue by default
treatStartDateOnlyAsOverdueDesc: When enabled, incomplete tasks with a start date but no end date are shown as overdue after the start date passes. When disabled, they show elapsed started days.
treatStartDateOnlyAsOverdueTask: Treat passed start date as overdue
treatStartDateOnlyAsOverdueTaskDesc: Only applies when the task has a start date and no end date. By default this follows the global setting.
taskPriorityDisplayStyleDesc: Choose whether priority color is displayed on the task card background or only on the checkbox border.
weekStartDayDesc: Set the start day of the week for week view
calendarShowCategoryAndProjectDesc: Show category icon and project name in calendar view
calendarShowLunarDesc: Show lunar date and festivals in calendar view
calendarShowHolidayDesc: Show public holidays in calendar view (H)
calendarHolidayIcsUrlDesc: Set the ICS URL for holiday subscription
updateHolidayDesc: Click to update holiday data immediately
dayStartTimeDesc: Set the start scroll position of the day for calendar view, e.g., 06:00 (still shows full day)
pasteTagsPlaceholder: One tag per line, supports - or * list prefix
tagsAlreadyExist: Selected tags already exist in the target project
confirmDeleteProject: Are you sure you want to delete project "${title}"?
confirmDeleteProjectTasks:
Do you want to delete all ${count} tasks in this project?

Select "Confirm" to delete all tasks, or "Cancel" to delete only the project.
importIcsDesc: Import tasks from an ICS file with support for batch setting project, tags and priority
importSuccess: ICS imported: added ${added}, updated ${updated}, total ${total} events
noValidEvents: No valid events found in ICS file
icsSubscriptionDesc: Subscribe to external ICS calendars (such as Outlook-generated ICS links, as well as importing holiday calendars, weather calendars, etc., created by others), and automatically synchronize events into this plugin. It is recommended to set up dedicated projects for each subscribed calendar (you can create a project status "Subscribed Calendar" specifically for storing these items). ⚠️ Note: Subscribed events cannot be edited. Help Documentation: How to Subscribe to External Online Calendars, such as Weather Calendars, Holiday Calendars, Outlook Calendars
confirmDeleteSubscription: Are you sure to delete subscription ${name}?
cannotEditSubscriptionTask: Subscription tasks cannot be edited, please modify in the original calendar
enableOutlinePrefixDesc: Add task status prefix to bound headings in outline (✅ completed ⏰ pending), does not affect heading content
showPomodoroInSummaryDesc: When enabled, task summary will include Pomodoro focus time statistics
showHabitInSummaryDesc: When enabled, task summary will include habit check-in progress statistics
showTaskNotesInSummaryDesc: When enabled, task summary will display task note content by default
showHabitNotesInSummary: Show habit check-in notes in summary
showHabitNotesInSummaryDesc: When enabled, task summary will display habit check-in notes by default
habitMemoSyncTemplateDesc: Markdown template for syncing habit check-ins to a block. Variables: ${date}, ${time}, ${dateTime}, ${habitName}, ${habitCheckinEmoji}, ${habitCheckinMeaning}, ${habitMemo}. Leave empty to use the default template.
calendarMultiDaysCountDesc: Set the number of days to display in multi-days view, default is 3 days
pomodoroNotePlaceholder: What did you focus on this time?
confirmDeletePomodoro: Are you sure you want to delete this pomodoro record?
confirmDeleteFilter: Are you sure you want to delete filter "${name}"?
customFilterSortChangeHint: This filter uses custom sorting. Please change sort order in Filter Settings.
customFilterSortTemporaryConfirmContent: The current filter "${name}" uses custom sorting. Temporarily change sort order? It will revert to the filter's configured sorting after switching filters.
vipTutorial: Help Document: How to open membership and use features on different devices
vipLoginToUse: ⚠️ Please log in to your SiYuan account first to use the subscription
vipHowToJoinWechat: ❓ How to join the member-exclusive WeChat group
vipJoinWechatDesc: Send payment screenshot and WeChat ID to achuan-2@outlook.com, I will add you and pull you into the group
vipDiscountNotice2: 🔈 SiYuan developers (whose works are in SiYuan bazaar or PR accepted) or students can enjoy a 40% discount on membership. Send proof to apply.
vipContributionRewardDesc: 🔈 Future contributors can apply for monthly, yearly, or lifetime membership based on code contribution level. Please send PR link and SiYuan Account ID to achuan-2@outlook.com for verification and activation.
vipManualCheckBtn: I have paid, get activation code
vipAutoFillFailed: Failed to fetch, please try again
vipActivationNotice1: The activation code is limited to the single tied SiYuan account and cannot be used for other users.
vipActivationNotice2: The activation code has no limit on activation times and can activate VIP features offline: other devices only need to sync workspace data or log in to the bound SiYuan account to use VIP features.
vipExchangeAndQADesc: For premium members, you can send payment screenshots to achuan-2@outlook.com to apply for joining the WeChat discussion group. If you prefer not to join the group or are unable to use WeChat, you can also consult me via email regarding usage issues.
vipQueryException: Query exception, please try again later
vipQrcodeGenerated: QR code generated, please scan with Alipay
vipExceptionOccurred: Exception occurred, please try again later
vipTrialKeyObtained: Trial activation code obtained and filled automatically
vipGetTrialKeyFailed: Failed to get trial activation code
vipInvalidKeyOrNotBelong: Activation code is invalid or does not belong to the current user
vipOverseasTransferNotice: Scan the QR code below to transfer money via Wise, Western Union, etc. After successful payment, send your SiYuan account ID + payment screenshot to achuan-2@outlook.com to request your activation code.
audioDownloadSuccess: Download successful, audio saved to local storage
audioDownloadFailed: Failed to download audio, please check your network connection
openFolderNotSupported: Current client does not support opening plugin data folder
deletePluginDataDesc: Delete all plugin data files, this operation is irreversible
confirmDeletePluginData: Are you sure to delete all plugin data? This operation is irreversible!
exportIcsDesc: Export reminders as a standard ICS calendar file, which can be imported into Outlook, Google Calendar, and other calendar apps
manageSubscriptionsDesc: Manage ICS calendar subscriptions with support for setting project, category, priority and sync frequency
icsSyncDesc: Upload ICS files to the cloud to sync reminders across devices. Supports SiYuan server or S3 storage.
calendarSubscribeHintDesc: Help Document: How to subscribe to plugin schedule in mobile calendars and other software
icsTaskFilterDesc: Select which tasks to export to the ICS file
icsDateFilterDesc: Select task date range to export to the ICS file
icsFileNameDesc: Custom ICS filename (without .ics extension), leave empty to auto-generate as reminder-randomID
icsSyncMethodDesc: Select the sync method for ICS files
icsSyncEnabledDesc: When enabled, automatically generate and upload ICS files to the cloud at the configured interval
icsSyncIntervalDesc: Set the frequency for automatically syncing ICS files to the cloud
icsSilentUploadDesc: When enabled, scheduled ICS uploads will not show success notification messages
uploadIcsToCloud: Generate and Upload ICS to Cloud
uploadIcsToCloudDesc: Generate ICS file and immediately upload it to the cloud
icsUploading: Generating and uploading ICS file to cloud...
icsCloudUrlDesc: Cloud URL automatically generated after successful upload
icsLastSyncAtDesc: Shows the time of the last successful ICS file upload
s3UseSiyuanConfigDesc: When enabled, SiYuan's S3 configuration will be used, no need to manually configure S3 parameters below
s3EndpointDesc: S3 service endpoint address, protocol prefix can be omitted (https:// added automatically)
s3StoragePathDesc: Storage path in S3, e.g.: /calendar/ or leave empty to store in root directory
s3ForcePathStyleDesc: Access file URL: Path-style: https://endpoint/bucket/key, Virtual hosted: https://bucket.endpoint/key
s3TlsVerifyDesc: Whether to verify TLS/SSL certificates, disabling allows connecting to services with self-signed certificates
s3CustomDomainDesc: Custom domain for generating external links, leave empty to use standard S3 URL
webdavUsernameDesc: Please enter the username for the WebDAV server
webdavPasswordDesc: Please enter the password for the WebDAV server
randomRestPopupWindowDesc: Shows a popup reminder in the center of the screen when a random break starts, and closes automatically when the break ends (global popup on desktop, SiYuan internal popup on other platforms)
groupDefaultHeadingLevel: Default Heading Level for Bound Block (Project Group)
groupDefaultHeadingLevelDesc: Set the default heading level when adding group-bound blocks
milestoneDefaultHeadingLevel: Default Heading Level for Bound Block (Project Milestone)
milestoneDefaultHeadingLevelDesc: Set the default heading level when adding heading milestones
pomodoroEndPopupWindowDesc: Shows a popup reminder in the center of the screen when the pomodoro work session ends (global popup on desktop, SiYuan internal popup on other platforms)
pomodoroCompletionNotePopup: Prompt for note after pomodoro completion
pomodoroCompletionNotePopupDesc: Show a note popup after a focus session is completed and saved
pomodoroDirectStartDesc: When enabled, clicking start pomodoro will directly begin with default duration without showing the preset submenu
pleaseStopTimerFirst: Please stop the current timer before switching mode
pomodoroWorkEndDesc: Work session ended. Time to get up, walk around and drink some water!
pomodoroBreakEndDesc: Break session ended. Get ready to start the next work session!
invalidTimeFormat: Invalid time format, please use MM:SS format (e.g. 25:00)
noteNotExist: Note does not exist or has been deleted
enterDockMode: Entered dock mode, click the progress bar to restore
enterFullscreenMode: Entered fullscreen mode, press ESC or click the button in the top right to exit
editTimeNotAllowed: Please pause the timer before editing time
pomodoroWorkCompleted: Work pomodoro complete! Time to take a break~
pomodoroWorkEndAutoBreak: Work time ended! Starting break automatically
pomodoroBreakEndAutoWork: Break ended! Starting next pomodoro automatically
pomodoroBreakEndSwitchWork: Break ended! Switching to work time (not starting automatically)
pomodoroCompletedLongBreak: Work time ended! Completed ${count} pomodoros, starting long break
taskPomodoroSyncToHabitToday: Count today's task pomodoros toward today's habit pomodoros
taskAutoCheckInHabitOnComplete: Auto check in habit when task is completed
dateTimeOptionalDesc: Reminders can be set after date and time are set
availableTodayDesc: 🍰 Available Today (Pinned to daily tasks, good for long-term tasks)
setDateTimeFirst: Set date and time for the task first, then use presets.
nlInputPlaceholder: e.g. tomorrow at 3pm, next Friday, in 3 days, etc.
nlInputDesc: Supports natural language, e.g. today, tomorrow, next Monday, March 15th, 2pm, etc.
pleaseEnterDateTimeDesc: Please enter a date and time description
pleaseSelectAtLeastOneWeekday: Please select at least one weekday
pleaseSelectAtLeastOneDay: Please select at least one day
invalidDateFormatMMDD: Invalid date format, please use MM-DD (e.g., 01-01)
openCreateGroupFailed: Failed to open create group dialog
statusIconHint: Use emoji as status icon, leave empty to hide
noTasksInMilestone: No related tasks in this milestone
moveTasksHint: ${count} tasks in this status will be moved to the selected status
kanbanStatusHint: Tip: "Doing" and "Completed" are fixed statuses and do not support renaming or deletion, but support sorting and changing colors.
clearDateHint: Clear the date of selected tasks
confirmBatchDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete the selected ${count} tasks? This action cannot be undone.
batchMilestoneMixedGroups: Batch milestone can only be applied to tasks within the same group
batchSetTagsFailed: Failed to set tags in batch
noOtherStatusToMove: No other unfinished status to move tasks to
dropToCalendarFailed: Unable to identify drop position, please drop on a date or time slot in the calendar.
hideNoDoingGroups: Hide groups with no tasks in progress
hideNoTodayGroups: Hide groups with no tasks due today
selectFilterToEdit: Select a filter to edit or create a new one
projectKanbanShowCompletedSubtasksDesc: Default for all project kanban boards. Changes are synced to existing projects and used for new projects. Individual projects can override this in kanban display settings.
projectKanbanShowTaskCategoriesDesc: Default for all project kanban boards. Changes are synced to existing projects and used for new projects. Individual projects can override this in kanban display settings.
projectKanbanClipTitleToOneLineDesc: Default for all project kanban boards. Changes are synced to existing projects and used for new projects. Individual projects can override this in kanban display settings.
applyProjectKanbanDisplaySettingsFailed: Failed to sync project kanban display settings
openNewTaskDialogFailed: Failed to open new task dialog
deleteRecordConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this record? This cannot be undone.
noCheckInEmojis: No check-in statuses configured. Please add them in habit settings first.
invalidYearlyDateRange: Date error: month must be 1–12, day must be 1–31
invalidYearlyDateFormat: Invalid date format, please use MM-DD (e.g. 01-01)
pasteBlockInvalid: Clipboard content is not a block reference/link
confirmDeleteInstanceOnDateMsg: Are you sure you want to delete the instance of recurring task "" on ?
noBoundTasks: No tasks bound to this block
pasteInstructions: Paste a Markdown list or multi-line text, each line will create a task. Supports multi-level lists to automatically create parent-child task relationships.
supportHierarchy: Supports multi-level: use indentation or multiple - symbols to create parent-child relationships
noTemplatesFound: No templates found. You can enter text in the editor and click 'Save as Template' to create one.
confirmDeleteTemplate: Are you sure you want to delete template "${name}"? This action cannot be undone.
supportBlockLinkDemo: Supports block link binding: [Task Title](siyuan://blocks/Block ID) or ((Block ID 'Task Title'))
notebookNameInPathNotExist: Notebook name in path does not exist, please check or select a valid notebook
cannotDetermineTargetNotebookSearch: Cannot determine target notebook, please include notebook name in path, specify in settings, or select via search
cannotDetermineTargetNotebook: Cannot determine target notebook, please include notebook name in path or set default notebook
createHeadingFailed: Failed to create heading: cannot get new block ID
helpDocumentDesc: Click the link below to view detailed tutorials and FAQs to help you better use the Task Note Management plugin.
vipOnlyFeature: This feature is only available to VIP users
upgradeToVipTip: Upgrade to VIP to unlock more advanced features and make task management more efficient
tasksDateTodayOrPast: Among selected tasks, ${count} have dates today or in the past. The system handles these tasks by automatically displaying them in the 'Doing' column.
moveOutDoingHint: To move these tasks out of 'Doing', please modify their date or time first.
pleaseInputDateTimeDesc: Please enter the date and time description
habitHideCheckedToday: Hide options already checked in today
dragToSortAndGroup: Drag to sort; drag into groups above to group
habitMemoBlockPlaceholder: Enter block ID, or paste block ref
habitMemoBlockRequiredAt: Option ${index} must set a block after note sync is enabled
habitMemoUnifiedBlockPlaceholder: Enter default target block ID, or paste block ref
habitMemoUnifiedBlockRequired: A sync target block is required after sync is enabled
habitMemoOverrideBlockPlaceholder: Optional; leave empty to use the habit target block
atLeastOneCheckInOption: At least one check-in option is required
checkInEmojiEmptyAt: Emoji cannot be empty for option ${index}
checkInMeaningEmptyAt: Meaning cannot be empty for option ${index}
groupNameDuplicateNotAllowed: Group name already exists; duplicates are not allowed
confirmDeleteCheckInOption: Are you sure you want to delete check-in option "${emoji} ${meaning}"?
globalKanbanStatusesDesc: Configure the default status columns used by project kanban boards for new projects or projects without custom statuses
confirmRestoreDefaultFilters: Restore the default filters? Custom filters will be kept and placed after the default filters.
kanbanStatusFilterByNameHint: Filter by status name. Statuses with the same name across projects are merged, and Completed is excluded.
defaultProjectSelectorViewModeDesc: Default view mode when searching or selecting projects in dialogs.
emojiTooltip: Left-click to select emoji, right-click to clear
createNewGroupByProjectName: Create a new group with the project's name
visibleStatusesForGroupHint: Unchecked statuses will be hidden in this group
reminderWebhookEnabledDesc: When a task or habit reminder triggers, send a POST JSON notification to the specified URL.
reminderWebhookUrlDesc: The URL to send notifications to when Webhook Notifications are enabled.
reminderWebhookJsonTypeDesc: Choose a preset JSON format. Select Custom to edit the JSON request body manually.
reminderWebhookJsonTemplateDesc: Only applies when Custom is selected. Variables: ${title} and ${message}. Leave empty to use the default Feishu text message format.
testWebhookDesc: Send a test Webhook message to verify the configuration.
testWebhookMessage: This is a test Webhook message from the SiYuan task note management plugin.
webhookUrlRequired: Please fill in the Webhook URL first
calendarCollapseTimeRangeDesc: Collapse specified sleep or non-working hours in the calendar view (week/day views only) to save space
calendarCollapseStartTimeDesc: Start time of the collapsed period, e.g., 03:00
calendarCollapseEndTimeDesc: End time of the collapsed period, e.g., 08:00
dragToAdjustCollapseRange: Drag to adjust hidden time range
